name: Mango Slaw
recipeIngredient: 2 large, slightly firm mangoes (about 1 3/4 pounds), peeled, pitted and thinly sliced (about 2 cups)
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, combine all ingredients. Toss with tongs or a fork to combine.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour. Serve cold.
author: cooking.nytimes.com
nutrition: Trans Fat: 0 grams | Fat: 10 grams | Calories: 179 | Saturated Fat: 2 grams | Unsaturated Fat: 8 grams | Sodium: 195 milligrams | Sugar: 19 grams | Fiber: 3 grams | Carbohydrate: 22 grams | Protein: 1 gram
